tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsEkmConnectionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new EkmConnection in a given Project and Location.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsEkmConnectionsList
tools.description: Lists EkmConnections.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsEkmConnectionsVerifyConnectivity
tools.description: Verifies that Cloud KMS can successfully connect to the external key manager specified by an EkmConnection. If there is an error connecting to the EKM, this method returns a FAILED_PRECONDITION status containing structured information as described at https://cloud.google.com/kms/docs/reference/ekm_errors.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsGenerateRandomBytes
tools.description: Generate random bytes using the Cloud KMS randomness source in the provided location.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCreate
tools.description: Create a new KeyRing in a given Project and Location.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCreate
tools.description: Create a new CryptoKey within a KeyRing. CryptoKey.purpose and CryptoKey.version_template.algorithm are required.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsAsymmetricDecrypt
tools.description: Decrypts data that was encrypted with a public key retrieved from GetPublicKey corresponding to a CryptoKeyVersion with CryptoKey.purpose ASYMMETRIC_DECRYPT.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsAsymmetricSign
tools.description: Signs data using a CryptoKeyVersion with CryptoKey.purpose ASYMMETRIC_SIGN, producing a signature that can be verified with the public key retrieved from GetPublicKey.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsCreate
tools.description: Create a new CryptoKeyVersion in a CryptoKey. The server will assign the next sequential id. If unset, state will be set to ENABLED.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsDestroy
tools.description: Schedule a CryptoKeyVersion for destruction. Upon calling this method, CryptoKeyVersion.state will be set to DESTROY_SCHEDULED, and destroy_time will be set to the time destroy_scheduled_duration in the future. At that time, the state will automatically change to DESTROYED, and the key material will be irrevocably destroyed. Before the destroy_time is reached, RestoreCryptoKeyVersion may be called to reverse the process.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsGetPublicKey
tools.description: Returns the public key for the given CryptoKeyVersion. The CryptoKey.purpose must be ASYMMETRIC_SIGN or ASYMMETRIC_DECRYPT.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsImport
tools.description: Import wrapped key material into a CryptoKeyVersion. All requests must specify a CryptoKey. If a CryptoKeyVersion is additionally specified in the request, key material will be reimported into that version. Otherwise, a new version will be created, and will be assigned the next sequential id within the CryptoKey.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsList
tools.description: Lists CryptoKeyVersions.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsMacSign
tools.description: Signs data using a CryptoKeyVersion with CryptoKey.purpose MAC, producing a tag that can be verified by another source with the same key.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsMacVerify
tools.description: Verifies MAC tag using a CryptoKeyVersion with CryptoKey.purpose MAC, and returns a response that indicates whether or not the verification was successful.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsPatch
tools.description: Update a CryptoKeyVersion's metadata. state may be changed between ENABLED and DISABLED using this method. See DestroyCryptoKeyVersion and RestoreCryptoKeyVersion to move between other states.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysCryptoKeyVersionsRestore
tools.description: Restore a CryptoKeyVersion in the DESTROY_SCHEDULED state. Upon restoration of the CryptoKeyVersion, state will be set to DISABLED, and destroy_time will be cleared.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysDecrypt
tools.description: Decrypts data that was protected by Encrypt. The CryptoKey.purpose must be ENCRYPT_DECRYPT.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysEncrypt
tools.description: Encrypts data, so that it can only be recovered by a call to Decrypt. The CryptoKey.purpose must be ENCRYPT_DECRYPT.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysList
tools.description: Lists CryptoKeys.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysUpdatePrimaryVersion
tools.description: Update the version of a CryptoKey that will be used in Encrypt. Returns an error if called on a key whose purpose is not ENCRYPT_DECRYPT.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsImportJobsCreate
tools.description: Create a new ImportJob within a KeyRing. ImportJob.import_method is required.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsImportJobsGet
tools.description: Returns metadata for a given ImportJob.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsImportJobsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsImportJobsList
tools.description: Lists ImportJobs.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsImportJobsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsImportJobsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsKeyRingsList
tools.description: Lists KeyRings.

tools.name: projects.cloudkmsProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
